title: tragacantha pellita
intro: Tragacantha pellita, also known as Tragacanth, is a type of plant-based adhesive derived from the sap of several species of plants in the genus Astragalus. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, and it has been used in herbal preparations such as poultices and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha pellita can be made into capsules or tablets for internal use, or it can be used externally as a topical cream or paste.
